rule: different country within 6.0h of previous login
status: LIVE feature implemented + tested; offline RBA lift UNMEASURABLE on sample
caveat: Stratified sample sub-samples negatives → consecutive-login adjacency is broken (only 3/140 ATO have any prior sampled login; median gap ~43 days). Geo-velocity needs the full ordered stream; measure on the raw dataset for a real lift.
limitation: full-stream RBA geo-velocity lift (needs raw 8.4GB dataset)
